## __TAG__

Release date: __RELEASE_DATE__

### Highlights
- Added major admin system upgrades with role management, block and restore controls, and audit logs
- Added user feedback flow with daily quota limits, email delivery, and admin-side feedback handling
- Added admin dashboard metrics, charts, search, filters, pagination, and user detail pages
- Improved blocked-account handling and protected access across login, sync, and feedback flows
- Improved multi-account local data isolation to prevent account crossover

### APK
- Android release package is attached to this release as `ledger-app.apk`

### Notes
- This release was created automatically by GitHub Actions from the pushed tag
- If this build includes Supabase changes, make sure the latest SQL and function deployments are already applied
